headline: Intel Announces Leadership Appointment at Intel Foundry to Accelerate Development and Manufacturing
summary:
SANTA CLARA, Calif., June 18, 2026 — Intel Corporation today announced the appointment of Seok-Hee Lee as executive vice president of Intel Foundry, reporting directly to CEO Lip-Bu Tan. In this role, Lee will lead all advanced packaging, system integration, back-end technology development, and back-end manufacturing, strengthening Intel’s ability to deliver differentiated, system-level innovation for … 
 The post  Intel Announces Leadership Appointment at Intel Foundry to Accelerate Development

headline: Intel Foundry Details Process Milestones and Future Innovation at VLSI Symposium
summary:
Santa Clara, California, June 16, 2026 – At the 2026 VLSI Symposium, Intel Foundry provided an update on its process roadmap and long-term innovation investments. It shared that Intel 18A‑P, the first performance enhancement in the Intel 18A family, has entered risk production, meeting the timeline first shared with customers and partners last year.“Our updates …
